predictions.generated: SELECT LOCATION,  name FROM stadium WHERE capacity BETWEEN 5000 AND 10000

predictions.question: What is the name and capacity of the stadium with the most concerts after 2013 ?
predictions.reference: SELECT t2.name , t2.capacity FROM concert AS t1 JOIN stadium AS t2 ON t1.stadium_id = t2.stadium_id WHERE t1.year > 2013 GROUP BY t2.stadium_id ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1
predictions.generated: SELECT T1.name,  T1.capacity FROM stadium AS T1 JOIN concert AS T2 ON T1.location  =  T2.location WHERE T2.year  >  2013 GROUP BY T1.name ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

predictions.question: What are the different names of the singers that have sales more than 300000?
predictions.reference: SELECT DISTINCT T1.Name FROM singer AS T1 JOIN song AS T2 ON T1.Singer_ID = T2.Singer_ID WHERE T2.Sales > 300000
predictions.generated: SELECT Name FROM singer WHERE Sales  >  300000 GROUP BY Name INTERSECT SELECT Name FROM singer WHERE Sales  >  300000 GROUP BY Name

predictions.question: Which first names are used for professionals or owners but are not used as dog names?
predictions.reference: SELECT first_name FROM Professionals UNION SELECT first_name FROM Owners EXCEPT SELECT name FROM Dogs
predictions.generated: SELECT first_name FROM Professionals EXCEPT SELECT first_name FROM Dogs INTERSECT SELECT first_name FROM Owners EXCEPT SELECT first_name FROM Professionals INTERSECT SELECT first_name FROM Owners

predictions.question: Who is the first student to register? List the first name, middle name and last name.?
predictions.reference: SELECT first_name , middle_name , last_name FROM Students ORDER BY date_first_registered ASC LIMIT 1
predictions.generated: SELECT first_name,  middle_name,  last_name FROM Students ORDER BY student_id ASC LIMIT 1

predictions.question: What are the names of the dogs for which the owner has not spend more than 1000 for treatment ?
predictions.reference: SELECT name FROM dogs WHERE dog_id NOT IN ( SELECT dog_id FROM treatments GROUP BY dog_id HAVING SUM(cost_of_treatment) > 1000 )
predictions.generated: SELECT T1.name FROM dogs AS T1 JOIN owners AS T2 ON T1.owner_id  =  T2.owner_id JOIN treatments AS T3 ON T1.treatment_id  =  T3.treatment_id WHERE T3.cost_of_treatment  <  1000 GROUP BY T1.name

predictions.question: Find the average age of students who do not have any pet .?
predictions.reference: SELECT AVG(age) FROM student WHERE stuid NOT IN (SELECT stuid FROM has_pet)

predictions.question: Find all airlines that have fewer than 200 flights.?
predictions.reference: SELECT T1.Airline FROM AIRLINES AS T1 JOIN FLIGHTS AS T2 ON T1.uid = T2.Airline GROUP BY T1.Airline HAVING COUNT(*) < 200

predictions.question: Find the name of the employee who got the highest one time bonus.?
predictions.reference: SELECT t1.name FROM employee AS t1 JOIN evaluation AS t2 ON t1.Employee_ID = t2.Employee_ID ORDER BY t2.bonus DESC LIMIT 1
predictions.generated: SELECT name FROM employee WHERE bonus  =  (SELECT max(bonus) FROM employee)

predictions.question: What are the id, name and membership level of visitors who have spent the largest amount of money in total in all museum tickets?
predictions.reference: SELECT t2.visitor_id , t1.name , t1.Level_of_membership FROM visitor AS t1 JOIN visit AS t2 ON t1.id = t2.visitor_id GROUP BY t2.visitor_id ORDER BY SUM(t2.Total_spent) DESC LIMIT 1
predictions.generated: SELECT T1.id,  T1.name,  T1.Level_of_membership FROM visitor AS T1 JOIN visit AS T2 ON T1.id  =  T2.visitor_id GROUP BY T1.id ORDER BY sum(T2.Total_spent) DESC LIMIT 1

predictions.question: Show the ids of high schoolers who have friends and are also liked by someone else.?
predictions.reference: SELECT student_id FROM Friend INTERSECT SELECT liked_id FROM Likes
predictions.generated: SELECT T1.id FROM Highschooler AS T1 JOIN Friend AS T2 ON T1.id  =  T2.friend_id JOIN Likes AS T3 ON T3.id  =  T2.id WHERE T1.grade  =  9 AND T3.student_id !=  T2.id GROUP BY T1.id HAVING count(*)  >  1

predictions.question: Return the money rank of the poker player with the greatest height.?
predictions.reference: SELECT T2.Money_Rank FROM people AS T1 JOIN poker_player AS T2 ON T1.People_ID = T2.People_ID ORDER BY T1.Height DESC LIMIT 1
predictions.generated: SELECT Money_Rank FROM poker_player ORDER BY Height DESC LIMIT 1

predictions.reference: SELECT song_name , song_release_year FROM singer ORDER BY age LIMIT 1
